title: EmDash plugin manifest
description: Hand-authored manifest for publishing a plugin to the EmDash plugin registry. Lives next to the plugin's `package.json` as `emdash-plugin.jsonc`.

__schema0.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema describing this file. Editors use this for completion and validation.

__schema1.title: License
__schema1.description: SPDX license expression (e.g. "MIT", "Apache-2.0", "MIT OR Apache-2.0"). Required on first publish; ignored on subsequent publishes (the existing profile wins).

__schema2.title: Publisher
__schema2.description: Atproto DID or handle of the publishing identity. Pinned on first publish to prevent accidental publishes from a different account. DIDs are recommended (durable); handles work but are mutable.

__schema4.title: Author
__schema4.description: A single author entry. Mirrors the lexicon's author shape.

__schema6.description: Author's homepage or profile URL. Either this or `email` is recommended.

__schema7.description: Author's contact email. Either this or `url` is recommended.

__schema8.title: Authors (multiple)
__schema8.description: Multi-author form. Mutually exclusive with `author`. Use the singular `author` if there is only one.

__schema10.title: Security contact
__schema10.description: A single security contact. At least one of `url` or `email` must be present.

__schema11.description: Security disclosure URL (e.g. a security.txt or vulnerability-reporting page). Either this or `email` is required.

__schema12.description: Security contact email. Either this or `url` is required.

__schema13.title: Security contacts (multiple)
__schema13.description: Multi-contact form. Mutually exclusive with `security`. Use the singular `security` if there is only one.

__schema14.title: Display name
__schema14.description: Human-readable name shown in directory listings. Defaults to the plugin's `id` when omitted.

__schema15.title: Description
__schema15.description: Short description (<= 140 graphemes by FAIR convention). Aggregators may truncate longer values when displaying in compact lists.

__schema18.title: Source repository
__schema18.description: HTTPS URL of the plugin's source repository. Surfaced in registry listings.
